response.justification: Candidate vastly exceeds the entry-level seniority bar with 15+ years of fullstack experience including TypeScript, Node.js, React-adjacent work, and AWS/Kubernetes exposure. Technical fit is strong, but the role is explicitly junior/mid-level and requires high on-site presence in what appears to be a German-speaking environment where the candidate has only basic German. Overqualification creates real risk of disengagement, salary mismatch, and short tenure, but skills alignment is excellent if the team is open to a senior IC at junior pricing or scope.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React-era fullstack background with PostgreSQL-adjacent SQL experience
Hits all nice-to-haves: AWS, Kubernetes, and current AI/MCP agent infrastructure work
Berlin-based with documented craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level IC role — likely flight risk and compensation mismatch
Only basic German may limit on-site collaboration in a construction/energy consulting context
No explicit Nest.js or PostgreSQL experience listed (MongoDB is the primary NoSQL/DB shown)

key_factors.factor: Basic German for high on-site German-market role
